---
title: "London vs Total Shares: Households, Spill Sites, and Spills"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Setup

```{r}
required_packages <- c(
  "arrow",
  "dplyr",
  "tidyr",
  "sf",
  "stringr",
  "here",
  "gt",
  "readr",
  "tibble"
)

install_if_missing <- function(packages) {
  new_packages <- packages[!sapply(packages, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
  if (length(new_packages) > 0) {
    install.packages(new_packages)
  }
  invisible(lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE))
}
install_if_missing(required_packages)

sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)

YEARS <- 2021:2023
RAD <- 250L
WRITE_CSV <- TRUE

path_house <- here::here("data", "processed", "house_price.parquet")
path_unique_sites <- here::here("data", "processed", "unique_spill_sites.parquet")
path_agg_yr <- here::here("data", "processed", "agg_spill_stats", "agg_spill_yr.parquet")
path_cross_sales_prior <- here::here(
  "data", "processed", "cross_section", "sales", "prior_to_sale"
)
path_lad <- here::here(
  "data", "raw", "shapefiles", "local_authorities_uk_buc",
  "Local_Authority_Districts_(May_2025)_Boundaries_UK_BUC.shp"
)

load_lad_boundaries <- function(path_lad) {
  sf::st_read(path_lad, quiet = TRUE) |>
    dplyr::mutate(is_london = stringr::str_starts(LAD25CD, "E09")) |>
    dplyr::select(LAD25CD, LAD25NM, is_london, geometry)
}

classify_points_to_london <- function(df, x_col, y_col, lad_sf) {
  df_tagged <- df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      has_valid_coords = !is.na(.data[[x_col]]) & !is.na(.data[[y_col]])
    )

  coord_lookup <- df_tagged |>
    dplyr::filter(has_valid_coords) |>
    dplyr::distinct(dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(c(x_col, y_col))))

  if (nrow(coord_lookup) == 0) {
    return(df_tagged |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        lad25cd = NA_character_,
        lad25nm = NA_character_,
        is_london = FALSE,
        is_matched = FALSE
      ))
  }

  points_sf <- sf::st_as_sf(
    coord_lookup,
    coords = c(x_col, y_col),
    crs = 27700,
    remove = FALSE
  )

  joined_lookup <- sf::st_join(
    points_sf,
    lad_sf,
    left = TRUE,
    join = sf::st_within
  ) |>
    sf::st_drop_geometry() |>
    dplyr::group_by(dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(c(x_col, y_col)))) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(c(x_col, y_col))),
      lad25cd = LAD25CD,
      lad25nm = LAD25NM,
      is_london = is_london,
      is_matched = !is.na(LAD25CD)
    )

  df_tagged |>
    dplyr::left_join(joined_lookup, by = c(x_col, y_col)) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      is_london = tidyr::replace_na(is_london, FALSE),
      is_matched = tidyr::replace_na(is_matched, FALSE)
    )
}

make_share_row <- function(metric, london_numerator, total_denominator) {
  tibble::tibble(
    metric = metric,
    london_numerator = london_numerator,
    total_denominator = total_denominator,
    share_london = dplyr::if_else(total_denominator > 0, london_numerator / total_denominator, NA_real_)
  )
}
```

## Load Data and Classify London

```{r}
lad_sf <- load_lad_boundaries(path_lad)

# Households base: sales transactions (2021-2023 cleaned sample)
house_sales <- arrow::open_dataset(path_house) |>
  dplyr::select(
    house_id, price, lsoa, property_type, old_new, duration,
    easting, northing
  ) |>
  dplyr::collect()

house_sales_geo <- classify_points_to_london(
  house_sales,
  x_col = "easting",
  y_col = "northing",
  lad_sf = lad_sf
)

# Spill sites base: unique site list
spill_sites <- arrow::open_dataset(path_unique_sites) |>
  dplyr::select(site_id, water_company, easting, northing) |>
  dplyr::collect() |>
  dplyr::distinct(water_company, site_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

spill_sites_geo <- classify_points_to_london(
  spill_sites,
  x_col = "easting",
  y_col = "northing",
  lad_sf = lad_sf
)

# Spill totals: annual site-level totals, summed over 2021-2023
spill_yr <- arrow::open_dataset(path_agg_yr) |>
  dplyr::filter(year %in% YEARS) |>
  dplyr::select(water_company, site_id, year, spill_count_yr, spill_hrs_yr) |>
  dplyr::collect()

spill_yr_geo <- spill_yr |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    spill_sites_geo |>
      dplyr::select(
        water_company, site_id, is_london, is_matched, has_valid_coords
      ),
    by = c("water_company", "site_id")
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    is_london = tidyr::replace_na(is_london, FALSE),
    is_matched = tidyr::replace_na(is_matched, FALSE),
    has_valid_coords = tidyr::replace_na(has_valid_coords, FALSE)
  )

# Site-based metrics: drop missing/invalid coordinates only.
# Valid but unmatched points are treated as outside London.
spill_sites_geo_valid <- spill_sites_geo |>
  dplyr::filter(has_valid_coords)

spill_yr_geo_valid <- spill_yr_geo |>
  dplyr::filter(has_valid_coords)
```

## Build Exact Hedonic Sales Sample Within 250m

```{r}
dat_cs_sales <- arrow::open_dataset(path_cross_sales_prior) |>
  dplyr::filter(radius == RAD) |>
  dplyr::filter(n_spill_sites > 0) |>
  dplyr::collect()

# Match hedonic_continuous_prior.R sample filters exactly for sales
dat_sales_hedonic <- dat_cs_sales |>
  dplyr::select(-dplyr::any_of("price")) |>
  dplyr::inner_join(
    house_sales_geo |>
      dplyr::select(
        house_id, price, lsoa, property_type, old_new, duration,
        easting, northing, is_london, is_matched, has_valid_coords
      ),
    by = "house_id"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(log_price = log(price)) |>
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(spill_count_daily_avg),
    !is.na(spill_hrs_daily_avg),
    !is.na(lsoa),
    !is.na(property_type),
    !is.na(old_new),
    !is.na(duration)
  )
```

## Compute Shares

```{r}
# 1) Households London / Total (whole sample)
metric_households <- make_share_row(
  metric = "Households (whole sample)",
  london_numerator = sum(house_sales_geo$is_london, na.rm = TRUE),
  total_denominator = nrow(house_sales_geo)
)

# 2) Spill sites London / Total (valid coordinates only)
metric_sites <- make_share_row(
  metric = "Spill sites (valid coordinates only)",
  london_numerator = sum(spill_sites_geo_valid$is_london, na.rm = TRUE),
  total_denominator = nrow(spill_sites_geo_valid)
)

# 3) Spills London / Total (2021-2023 totals; valid coordinates only)
metric_spill_count <- make_share_row(
  metric = "Spill count (2021-2023 total; valid coordinates only)",
  london_numerator = sum(spill_yr_geo_valid$spill_count_yr[spill_yr_geo_valid$is_london], na.rm = TRUE),
  total_denominator = sum(spill_yr_geo_valid$spill_count_yr, na.rm = TRUE)
)

metric_spill_hours <- make_share_row(
  metric = "Spill hours (2021-2023 total; valid coordinates only)",
  london_numerator = sum(spill_yr_geo_valid$spill_hrs_yr[spill_yr_geo_valid$is_london], na.rm = TRUE),
  total_denominator = sum(spill_yr_geo_valid$spill_hrs_yr, na.rm = TRUE)
)

# 4) Households within 250m used in hedonic regressions (exact sales sample)
metric_hedonic_250 <- make_share_row(
  metric = "Households within 250m (exact hedonic sales sample)",
  london_numerator = sum(dat_sales_hedonic$is_london, na.rm = TRUE),
  total_denominator = nrow(dat_sales_hedonic)
)

summary_shares <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  metric_households,
  metric_sites,
  metric_spill_count,
  metric_spill_hours,
  metric_hedonic_250
)

summary_shares
```

## Main Summary Table

```{r}
summary_shares |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::fmt_number(
    columns = c(london_numerator, total_denominator),
    decimals = 2,
    sep_mark = ","
  ) |>
  gt::fmt_percent(columns = share_london, decimals = 2) |>
  gt::cols_label(
    metric = "Metric",
    london_numerator = "London Numerator",
    total_denominator = "Total Denominator",
    share_london = "London Share"
  ) |>
  gt::tab_header(
    title = "London / Total Shares",
    subtitle = "Households, spill sites, spill counts/hours, and 250m hedonic sales sample"
  )
```

## Classification Audit

```{r}
audit_stats <- tibble::tibble(
  dataset = c(
    "Households (whole sample)",
    "Spill sites (whole sample)",
    "Spill-year rows (for metric 3)",
    "Hedonic sales sample within 250m"
  ),
  n_total = c(
    nrow(house_sales_geo),
    nrow(spill_sites_geo),
    nrow(spill_yr_geo),
    nrow(dat_sales_hedonic)
  ),
  n_with_valid_coords = c(
    sum(house_sales_geo$has_valid_coords, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(spill_sites_geo$has_valid_coords, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(spill_yr_geo$has_valid_coords, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(dat_sales_hedonic$has_valid_coords, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  n_lad_matched = c(
    sum(house_sales_geo$is_matched, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(spill_sites_geo$is_matched, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(spill_yr_geo$is_matched, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(dat_sales_hedonic$is_matched, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  n_missing_or_invalid_coords = c(
    sum(!house_sales_geo$has_valid_coords, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(!spill_sites_geo$has_valid_coords, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(!spill_yr_geo$has_valid_coords, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(!dat_sales_hedonic$has_valid_coords, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  n_valid_but_unmatched = c(
    sum(house_sales_geo$has_valid_coords & !house_sales_geo$is_matched, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(spill_sites_geo$has_valid_coords & !spill_sites_geo$is_matched, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(spill_yr_geo$has_valid_coords & !spill_yr_geo$is_matched, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(dat_sales_hedonic$has_valid_coords & !dat_sales_hedonic$is_matched, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
)

audit_stats |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::fmt_number(columns = where(is.numeric), decimals = 0, sep_mark = ",") |>
  gt::tab_header(
    title = "Audit of London Classification Coverage",
    subtitle = "Coordinate validity and LAD boundary match rates"
  )
```

## Unmatched Spill Site Diagnostics

```{r}
unmatched_spill_sites <- spill_sites_geo |>
  dplyr::filter(!is_matched)

cat("Unmatched spill sites:", nrow(unmatched_spill_sites), "\n")
cat(" - Missing/invalid coordinates:",
    sum(!unmatched_spill_sites$has_valid_coords, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat(" - Valid coordinates but outside all LAD polygons:",
    sum(unmatched_spill_sites$has_valid_coords, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

unmatched_by_company <- unmatched_spill_sites |>
  dplyr::count(water_company, sort = TRUE)

unmatched_by_company |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gt::fmt_number(columns = n, decimals = 0, sep_mark = ",") |>
  gt::tab_header(
    title = "Unmatched Spill Sites by Water Company"
  )

unmatched_valid <- unmatched_spill_sites |>
  dplyr::filter(has_valid_coords)

if (nrow(unmatched_valid) > 0) {
  unmatched_valid_sf <- sf::st_as_sf(
    unmatched_valid,
    coords = c("easting", "northing"),
    crs = 27700,
    remove = FALSE
  )

  nearest_idx <- sf::st_nearest_feature(unmatched_valid_sf, lad_sf)
  nearest_lad <- lad_sf[nearest_idx, c("LAD25CD", "LAD25NM")]
  nearest_dist_km <- as.numeric(
    sf::st_distance(
      unmatched_valid_sf,
      lad_sf[nearest_idx, ],
      by_element = TRUE
    )
  ) / 1000

  unmatched_nearest <- unmatched_valid |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      nearest_lad25cd = nearest_lad$LAD25CD,
      nearest_lad25nm = nearest_lad$LAD25NM,
      nearest_lad_dist_km = nearest_dist_km
    )

  unmatched_distance_bins <- unmatched_nearest |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      distance_band = cut(
        nearest_lad_dist_km,
        breaks = c(-Inf, 0.1, 1, 5, 20, Inf),
        labels = c("<=0.1km", "0.1-1km", "1-5km", "5-20km", ">20km")
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::count(distance_band, sort = FALSE)

  unmatched_distance_bins |>
    gt::gt() |>
    gt::fmt_number(columns = n, decimals = 0, sep_mark = ",") |>
    gt::tab_header(
      title = "Distance of Unmatched Spill Sites to Nearest LAD"
    )

  unmatched_nearest |>
    dplyr::count(nearest_lad25cd, nearest_lad25nm, sort = TRUE) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 20) |>
    gt::gt() |>
    gt::fmt_number(columns = n, decimals = 0, sep_mark = ",") |>
    gt::tab_header(
      title = "Top Nearest LADs for Unmatched Spill Sites"
    )
}
```

## Export Summary Table

```{r}
if (WRITE_CSV) {
  out_csv <- here::here(
    "output", "tables", "london_total_shares_houses_spills.csv"
  )
  dir.create(dirname(out_csv), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  readr::write_csv(summary_shares, out_csv)
  cat("Wrote:", out_csv, "\n")
}
```
